title: Real Estate Is Next Bet for Debt Investors Avoiding Private Credit (Podcast)
title_cn: 房地产是债务投资者避免私人信贷的下一个赌注（播客）
summary: Private credit disarray spells opportunity for housing giant Pretium, which targets high returns by lending to US homebuilders. “Our private credit looks a little bit different than other private credit in the sense that we are secured, we have real good downside protection,” Jon Pruzan, the company’s co-president, tells Bloomberg News’ James Crombie and Bloomberg Intelligence’s Erica Adelberg in this episode of the Credit Edge podcast. “We have a lot of people who want capital and not a lot of

title: Macro Matters: BE’s Anna Wong on Warsh, Fed & Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 宏观问题：BE 的 Anna Wong 谈 Warsh、美联储和美联储通胀前景
summary: With Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as Federal Reserve chair behind him, the discourse can move to what it signals for monetary policy. Bloomberg Economics Chief US Economist Anna Wong joins Ira Jersey on this edition of Macro Matters and argues that while Warsh avoided explicit forward guidance, his emphasis was on price stability, skepticism toward forecast precision and support for a shorter policy statement all point to a more hawkish lean than many investors expected.

title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹运输量开始增加，石油将每周大幅下跌
summary: Oil headed for a substantial weekly drop as the US-Iran interim peace deal saw shipping through the Strait of Hormuz start to return to normal, easing the global crude market’s biggest ever supply shock.

title: MSCI Flags Indonesia Market Accessibility Concerns in Review
title_cn: MSCI 在审查中指出印度尼西亚市场准入问题

title_cn: 鹰派美联储胜过和平协议，金价将每周下跌
summary: Gold is on track for a third weekly loss, as a hawkish Federal Reserve and rate-hike bets outweigh the signing of an interim peace deal between the US and Iran.

title: Extenet Warns Cash to Run Out in Days Without ABS Holder Relief
title_cn: Extenet 警告称，如果没有 ABS 持有人救济，现金将在几天内耗尽
summary: Telecom-infrastructure firm Extenet is facing a cash crunch that could force it to cease operations before the end of the month, according to a letter shared with the company’s bond investors.

title: Japan Push for Corporate Growth Over Value Sets Off Skepticism
title_cn: 日本推动企业增长而非价值引发质疑
summary: The Japanese government’s new push to encourage companies to use their cash for longer-term growth is raising concerns it will lead to unprofitable investments and erode corporate value.

title: Asia Stocks Set to Rise as US-Iran Deal Lifts Mood: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议提振情绪，亚洲股市将上涨：市场结束
summary: Stocks in Asia were poised to rise Friday after a peace deal between the US and Iran boosted optimism that the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation pressures by restoring oil flows.

title: ICE Reverses Plan to Detain Migrants in Mega-Warehouses
title_cn: ICE 撤销在大型仓库拘留移民的计划
summary: The Department of Homeland Security is backing away from a controversial plan to turn empty warehouses into immigration detention centers and will keep relying largely on existing jails run by private contractors and state and local partners.

title_cn: 毕马威澳大利亚丑闻升温，议会清算
summary: KPMG Australia is set for a public reckoning as lawmakers demand information and changes in an industry beset by a series of scandals around the misuse of confidential client information.

title: CFTC Not Ready for Prediction Market Social Cost, State AGs Say
title_cn: 国家 AG 称 CFTC 尚未准备好预测市场社会成本
summary: Attorneys general for California and Minnesota said the Commodity Futures Trading Commission isn’t equipped to handle gambling-associated issues like addiction, highlighting challenges the federal regulator faces as it aims to assert authority over prediction markets.

title: Elliott, SVP Buy Braskem Debt Amid Restructuring Talks
title_cn: Elliott 高级副总裁在重组谈判中购买 Braskem 债务
summary: Elliott Investment Management LP and SVP Global have recently bought debt of Braskem SA, the Brazilian petrochemical producer rushing to get creditors to agree to a restructuring plan, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Eases Inflation Angst: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议缓解通胀忧虑，股市上涨：市场结束
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks joining bonds higher after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.

title: Schwab Warns of Margin Calls as Concerns Over Tax Bets Mount
title_cn: 由于对税收赌注的担忧加剧，施瓦布警告追加保证金
summary: Charles Schwab Corp. is imposing new margin requirements for clients using long-short investment strategies, adding more guardrails around a fast-growing tax-management trade.

title: The Knicks Win! So Do New York City, Big Merch And The NBA
title_cn: 尼克斯赢了！纽约市、大型商场和 NBA 也是如此
summary: The New York Knicks weren’t the only big winners of this year’s NBA finals. On today’s Big Take podcast, Jason Kelly and Randall Williams tell Sarah Holder what the series means for the league’s bottom line, New York’s economy and Jalen Brunson’s future as a pitchman. Listen wherever you get your podcasts.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース

title_cn: 永纯CEO：数据必须成为企业的首要任务
summary: Charlie Giancarlo, CEO of Everpure discusses what he sees as the evolution for companies using apps to a unified data environment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Rallies to Record After Trump Touts Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普吹捧苹果芯片交易后，英特尔股价创历史新高
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: Thousands of Public-School Staff Across US Face Layoff Warnings
title_cn: 美国数千名公立学校员工面临裁员警告
summary: Bloomberg's Erin Hudson joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Thousands of US public-school employees have received warnings saying they could lose their jobs as the nation’s education system grapples with mounting financial pressures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Falls Back Toward $60,000 on Strategy Shares, Rate Fears
title_cn: 策略股、利率担忧导致比特币回落至 60,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin extended its slide back toward the $60,000 level. The decline is driven by mounting concerns over the unraveling of Strategy Inc.’s funding mechanism, alongside rate-hike fears that are dampening demand for riskier assets.

title: July Fed Rate-Hike Wagers Drive Bond Futures Volume Surge
title_cn: 7月美联储加息押注推动债券期货成交量激增
summary: The Treasury market saw a record surge in futures trading that underpins bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to boost interest rates.

title: Oaktree Private Credit Fund Redemptions Drop Below Key 5% Limit
title_cn: 橡树私人信贷基金赎回跌破 5% 的关键限额
summary: Danielle Poli, managing director and co-portfolio manager, global credit at Oaktree Capital Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." An Oaktree Capital Management private credit fund saw redemption requests drop by nearly half in the second quarter, making it the first major firm to stem a growing exodus from the $1.8 trillion industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Crypto-Treasury Dream Unravels After a 90% Stock Plunge
title_cn: 股价暴跌 90% 后加密货币金库梦想破灭
summary: The business model of launching a public company to buy crypto is falling apart. As a result, those in the queue to do so through blank-check companies are facing pressure from investors against a market backdrop that is fiercely unfriendly.

title: Heart Health Biotech Kardigan Up 38% After $400 Million IPO
title_cn: 心脏健康生物技术公司 Kardigan 首次公开募股 4 亿美元后股价上涨 38%
summary: Kardigan Inc. shares surged 38% in its trading debut, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.

title: Newsom Rushes to Sink Billionaire Tax Before Deadline
title_cn: 纽瑟姆急于在截止日期前减免亿万富翁税
summary: Bloomberg's Eliyahu Kamisher joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Governor Gavin Newsom is mounting a last-ditch pressure campaign to stop a proposed California billionaire tax from ever reaching voters. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hawkish Fed to Put Pressure on Historically Tight Credit Spreads
title_cn: 鹰派美联储将对历史上紧缩的信用利差施压
summary: Amanda Lynam, chief credit strategist at Goldman Sachs, and Danielle Poli, managing director and co-portfolio manager, global credit at Oaktree Capital Management, join Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Hawkish signals from the Federal Reserve at Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chair are increasing pressure on corporate credit spreads, which are near historic lows, according to analysts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bank of England Holds Rates in 7-2 Vote as Oil Outlook Eases
title_cn: 由于石油前景缓和，英国央行以 7 比 2 的投票结果维持利率不变
summary: Bloomberg Economics Anna Andrade joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." The Bank of England held interest rates at 3.75% as it said the recent fall in oil prices was “encouraging,” even while two of the nine policymakers voted for an immediate quarter-point hike over concerns of persistent inflation.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar Sees ‘Bullish Break’ as Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Rally
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动美元反弹，美元迎来“看涨突破”
summary: The dollar staged its biggest two-day rally in three months, driving it back toward a late-March peak, as traders piled into bets that the Federal Reserve will start raising interest rates as soon as late next month.

title: Gold Declines as Hawkish Fed Outweighs Relief from US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 鹰派美联储的影响超过美伊协议带来的缓解，金价下跌
summary: Gold slipped as the Federal Reserve’s hawkish stance outweighed an interim peace deal between the US and Iran that eased inflation risks.

title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Equities Rally | The Close 6/18/2026
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动股市上涨收盘价 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are GenTrust Head of NY Office, Senior Client Advisor Mimi Duff, Principal Venture Partners Founder & Managing Partner Songyee Yoon, Wedbush SVP of Equity Research Alicia Reese, Goldman Sachs Northeast Region Head Nicole Pullen Ross, Interactive Brokers Chief Strategist Steve Sosnick, JP Morgan Asset Management CEO George Gatch, Chef & Restauranteur Kwame Onwuachi, Former Lululemon CIO Julie Averill, Candle Media Founder & Co-CEO Kevin Mayer. & SevenRooms Co-Founder & CEO Joel Montaniel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Criticizes EU Proposal for Satellite Spectrum Tender
title_cn: SpaceX 批评欧盟卫星频谱招标提案
summary: SpaceX criticized the European Union’s plans for the distribution of satellite spectrum, a key element in the growth plans for the Elon Musk-led company’s Starlink service following its record-setting initial public offering.

title: SevenRooms CEO on New Reservation Organizing Platform
title_cn: SevenRooms 首席执行官谈新的预订组织平台
summary: Joel Montaniel, Co-Founder and CEO of SevenRooms, discussed the company's new platform, Channel Connect, which aims to simplify reservation management for restaurants by consolidating bookings from multiple channels into a single system. Unlike the hotel industry, where centralized booking systems are common, restaurants currently manage reservations across various apps and platforms, often using multiple devices, creating operational challenges. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Candle’s Mayer Says Ad-Backed Streaming ‘Snuck Up’ on Industry
title_cn: Candle 的梅耶尔表示，广告支持的流媒体“偷偷”进入了行业
summary: Fox Corp.’s $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. illustrates how free-to-watch, ad-supported streaming services are becoming a major force in the entertainment industry, according to Candle Media Inc. co-Chief Executive Officer Kevin Mayer.

title: Companies Move to Secure Data as AI Increases Security Risks
title_cn: 随着人工智能增加安全风险，公司转向保护数据
summary:
Michael Cardaci, CEO of FedHIVE said that the government is moving 'faster than its ever moved before' to secure data and make sure that US computing companies are compliant in case of national security risks as AI use ramps up. 
Cardaci said that the US government is focused on keeping US technology inside of its borders as the race for global AI dominance heats up.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Disney Exec: Media Consolidating Around New Model
title_cn: 先生。迪士尼高管：围绕新模式进行媒体整合
summary:
Kevin Mayer, former Walt Disney Direct-to-Consumer & International Chair, discusses Fox's recent $22 billion acquisition of Roku, highlighting a significant strategic move from traditional media towards streaming. Fox, which previously lacked a major streaming platform, aims to strengthen its position by integrating Roku's streaming service alongside its existing ad-supported streamer, Tubi. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Acts to Speed Up Power Grid Hook-Ups for AI Data Centers
title_cn: 美国采取措施加快人工智能数据中心的电网连接
summary: US regulators have taken their biggest step yet to speed the connection of data centers to the country’s grids while simultaneously attempting to slow surging utility bills that have angered Americans.

title: SpaceX Shares End First Week of Trading Up 37% From IPO Price
title_cn: SpaceX 股价首周较 IPO 价格上涨 37%
summary: SpaceX stock ended higher in its first week of trading, even though its rough ride showed the largest-ever IPO was not immune to the type of share-price volatility that tends to rock big companies after they go public.

title: Fmr. Lululemon CIO on AI’s Impact on C-Suites, Jobs
title_cn: 先生。 Lululemon 首席信息官谈人工智能对高管层和工作的影响
summary: Julie Averill, former CIO of Lululemon, REI, and Nordstrom, discusses this shift in the context of her new book, "Chief Impact Officer," which offers a fresh perspective on leadership amid the ongoing technological revolution. Averill brings her extensive experience scaling Lululemon's revenue to over $10 billion to the conversation, emphasizing the critical role of AI adoption in maintaining job security and driving organizational impact. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: President Trump Announces Apple and Intel Chip Collaboration | Bloomberg Tech 6/18/2026
title_cn: 特朗普总统宣布苹果与英特尔芯片合作 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow discusses the latest announcement made by President Donald Trump, which will see Apple and Intel joining forces to produce chips domestically, sending shares of the chipmaker higher. Plus, Anduril's CEO discusses how the company won a contract with the US Air Force to produce autonomous fighters. And, SpaceX wraps up its first full week of trading, with shares falling for a second day straight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Says Canada’s Data Law Changes Fail to Ease Concerns
title_cn: 谷歌称加拿大数据法修改未能缓解担忧
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said Canada’s changes to a proposed law that would help police obtain citizen data from private companies don’t resolve many of its concerns.

title: JPM Asset Mgt. CEO: AI Can Power Markets for Some Time
title_cn: 摩根大通资产管理CEO：人工智能可以在一段时间内为市场提供动力
summary: George Gatch, CEO of JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the current excitement surrounding mega-cap initial public offerings (IPOs) in the technology sector. He emphasized the strong innovation and investment opportunities these IPOs present, describing the trend as a 'rising tide that is lifting all boats.' He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise With Nvidia Leading as Semiconductor Companies Surge
title_cn: 半导体公司激增，英伟达领涨，股价上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Thursday as chips shares extended Wednesday’s rally. Nvidia Corp. topped S&P 500 Index gainers on a points basis, while the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, known as the SOX, advanced 6.4% to a record high.

title: Meta Strikes New AI Computing Deals With Data Center Firm Crusoe
title_cn: Meta 与数据中心公司 Crusoe 达成新的人工智能计算协议
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has secured new agreements to get AI computing power from data center developer Crusoe, bolstering the infrastructure it needs to support an ambitious artificial intelligence expansion.

title: Goldman’s Pullen Ross: PE ‘Actively Engaged’ in Sports
title_cn: 高盛的普伦·罗斯：体育界“积极参与”体育运动
summary: Nicole Pullen Ross, Northeast Region Head & Head of Sports and Entertainment Solutions at Goldman Sachs, discusses the evolving landscape of US sports and the athletes driving their growing popularity. She highlighted her role in creating a division at Goldman Sachs dedicated to helping professional athletes manage their wealth by applying strategies typically used by C-suite executives. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Even Madonna Has to Fight for Every Scrap of Internet Attention
title_cn: 甚至麦当娜也必须为互联网上的每一点关注而奋斗
summary: Even if you’re one of the biggest pop stars in history, Grindr and Bilt can help you sell albums

title: Rumble Bets on AI Compute Demand With New AI Platform
title_cn: Rumble 通过新的人工智能平台押注人工智能计算需求
summary: Video platform Rumble is jumping on the AI bandwagon with its newest AI platform. Launching as Quake AI, the new sector combines cloud, compute, and AI infrastructure, and is slated to dominate the company's business segment. Rumble CEO Chris Pavlovski joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" with more on the pivot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Anticipate Fresh Liquidity Following Historic SpaceX Debut
title_cn: 投资者预计 SpaceX 历史性首次亮相后将出现新的流动性
summary: SpaceX's historic public debut comes during a critical inflection point as a wave of multibillion-dollar AI companies prepare to go public. With the unprecedented IPO, investors are anticipating a wide-scale "distribution event" that will give private markets the fresh cash it desperately needs. Matt Witheiler, Head of Late-Stage Growth at Wellington Management, thinks the private tech ecosystem will see a cash return. He joins Ed Ludlow of "Bloomberg Tech". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Look Beyond Chips For Next Big Thing in Tech
title_cn: 投资者不仅关注芯片，还关注科技领域的下一个重大事件
summary: As the AI hype continues to grow, investors are looking beyond chips to find the next big thing to revolutionize the tech sector. Ankur Crawford, Portfolio Manager at Alger, says there hasn't been a business like SpaceX before as markets react to the significance of the AI trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech".  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Workers Say Data Center Testimony Prompted HR Calls
title_cn: 亚马逊员工表示数据中心的证词促使人力资源部致电
summary: Three Amazon.com Inc. workers say the company violated a Seattle ordinance by interrogating them after they testified in favor of regulation of data centers in the city.

title: Google’s Secret Warrant Fight Over DOJ Pipe Bomb Probe Revealed
title_cn: 谷歌关于美国司法部管道炸弹调查的秘密授权之争曝光
summary: Google waged a secret court fight against a US warrant demanding identities of hundreds of internet users who searched for the Democratic and Republican party headquarters in Washington before pipe bombs were planted there on the eve of the Capitol riot on Jan. 6, 2021, newly unsealed records reveal.

title: Tesla Stock Underperforms SpaceX in First Week After IPO
title_cn: 特斯拉股价在 IPO 后第一周表现逊于 SpaceX
summary: Tesla Inc. stock is set to end the holiday-shortened week lower after SpaceX went public last Friday.

title: Autonomous Trucks Can Be Life-Saving
title_cn: 自动驾驶卡车可以拯救生命
summary: After experiencing the technology firsthand, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Thomas Black examined the data to find out what autonomous trucks could mean for the future of road safety. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine's Denikeieva on Building AI for Citizens
title_cn: 乌克兰的 Denikeieva 谈为公民构建人工智能
summary: Ukraine’s Deputy Minister of Digital Transformation Nataliia Denikeieva discusses digital resiliency and building artificial intelligence for citizens, with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Steinberger, LeCun, Habib on AI Deployment
title_cn: Steinberger、LeCun、Habib 谈人工智能部署
summary: Austrian programmer Peter Steinberger, AMI Labs's Yann LeCun, and Writer CEO May Habib discuss the possibilities and deployment of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba's Tsai, zu Furstenberg Discuss AI Investment
title_cn: 阿里巴巴董事局主席蔡崇信将与芙丝汀宝讨论人工智能投资
summary: Alibaba Group Chairman Joe Tsai and General Catalyst Managing Director Jeannette zu Furstenberg discuss investment opportunities and leadership with the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WWW Inventor Tim Berners-Lee on Development of AI
title_cn: WWW 发明家 Tim Berners-Lee 谈人工智能的发展
summary: Tim Berners-Lee, the inventor of the World Wide Web, discusses the development of artificial intelligence with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie at the VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Square Enix Takes on ‘Zelda’ With ‘The Adventures of Elliot’
title_cn: 史克威尔艾尼克斯推出《艾略特历险记》挑战《塞尔达》
summary: The new game is Square Enix’s first attempt to blend action combat with an ‘HD-2D’ art style

title: Anduril Secures Landmark Air Force Drone Contract
title_cn: 安杜里尔 (Anduril) 获得具有里程碑意义的空军无人机合同
summary: Anduril just won a production contract for autonomous fighters with the US Air Force. It's also secured a key role in the race to provide software for those aircraft, and is moving toward scaled manufacturing as the Pentagon pushes for a fleet of up to 1,000 autonomous combat jets. Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss it all. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Ends Hormuz Blockade, Downplays Tolls as Negotiations Restart
title_cn: 美国结束霍尔木兹封锁，淡化死亡人数，重启谈判
summary: The US-Iran interim peace deal took effect and shipping started returning to the Strait of Hormuz as the US declared an end to its blockade and a complex negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program began in earnest.

title: EU Leaders Warn on China Trade Imbalance But Respond Cautiously
title_cn: 欧盟领导人对中国贸易失衡发出警告但反应谨慎
summary: European Union leaders sought to strike a balance between addressing deepening trade imbalances with China while not provoking a damaging conflict with the world’s No. 2 economy.

title: Obama Presidential Center Tells An Incredible Story: Morial
title_cn: 奥巴马总统中心讲述了一个令人难以置信的故事：莫里尔
summary: Marc Morial, President & CEO of the National Urban League, discusses the grand opening of the Obama Presidential Center and what the center represents. He also talks about how recent redistricting efforts, especially in the South, are impacting the Black electorate. Marc speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bonta Calls DOJ’s Statement Clearing Paramount Deal ‘Shameless’
title_cn: 邦塔称司法部澄清派拉蒙交易的声明“无耻”
summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta criticized the Trump administration for clearing Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., as several states mull a possible challenge to the deal.

title: Aaron David Miller: JD Vance's Warning to Israel 'Unprecedented'
title_cn: 亚伦·大卫·米勒：JD·万斯对以色列的警告“前所未有”
summary: Aaron David Miller, Senior Fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, comments on Vice President JD Vance’s warning to Israel against attacking its “only powerful ally.” He also discusses whether it’s likely Trump would resume bombing if Iran doesn’t hold their end of the bargain with midterms around the corner. He speaks to Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU’s Costa Justifies Putin Back Channel as Useful Groundwork
title_cn: 欧盟科斯塔证明普京的回击渠道是有用的基础
summary: European Council President Antonio Costa defended his recent outreach to Russia during a meeting with European Union leaders, arguing he was well-positioned to convey the bloc’s interests despite frustration over his diplomatic overtures.

title: US-Iran Deal Eases Inflation Angst, Knicks Celebrate in NYC| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/18/2026
title_cn: 美伊协议缓解通胀担忧，尼克斯队在纽约庆祝|彭博商业周刊日报 6/18/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike Mckee discusses newly minted Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's impact on future decisions as the Fed takes on a hawkish bent under his leadership. Then, Sherry Paul, managing director and private wealth advisor at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth Management, on how she is approaching the investment market as tech stocks dominate the majority of growth.  Plus, Deep Fission CEO Liz Muller is joined by Bloomberg's Will Wade to discuss strides in nuclear power innovation as her company begins trading. Finally, Randall Williams recounts the New York Knicks championship ticker tape parade and previews this weekend's slate of World Cup games. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Deal a 'Real Defeat' for the US, John Bolton Says
title_cn: 约翰·博尔顿表示，伊朗对美国来说是“真正的失败”
summary: "This is a self-inflicted wound if ever there was one," Former National Security Advisor John Bolton says. Speaking on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition," Bolton warns that Iran will use oil funds to rebuild their war capabilities and calls the current situation a "trap of Trump's own making." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Much Did Brexit Actually Cost Britain?
title_cn: 英国脱欧实际上给英国造成了多少损失？
summary: In this weekly documentary from Bloomberg Originals, we do the math.

title: Lula Ally Allegedly Got Apartment, Tickets in Master Fraud
title_cn: 卢拉·艾莉涉嫌在诈骗大师中获得公寓和门票
summary: Brazilian investigators suspect Banco Master and related entities paid for an apartment and premium concert tickets for relatives of Senator Jaques Wagner as part of a scheme to conceal kickbacks to the senior ally of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, according to Supreme Court documents.

title: What 10 Years of Brexit Has Cost the UK
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年给英国带来了什么代价
summary: In June 2016, the UK voted to leave the European Union. Ten years later, Bloomberg Originals unpacks the economic cost of Brexit and the political forces it unleashed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bill Pulte Brings Trump-Era Disruption to US Spy Agency
title_cn: 比尔·普尔特给美国间谍机构带来特朗普时代的颠覆
summary: The housing chief has no intelligence experience but is 100% loyal to the president.

title: Vance Leaves Shippers in the Dark on Potential Iran Hormuz Tolls
title_cn: 万斯让托运人对伊朗霍尔木兹海峡潜在通行费一无所知
summary: US Vice President JD Vance skirted questions about whether Iran will one day be able to charge fees for vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz, a critical concern for the oil and shipping industries as well as Gulf producers as the chokepoint opens up to traffic again.

title: How US Lawmakers See US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 美国议员如何看待美伊协议
summary: The interim deal with Iran opens the door for 60 days of negotiations, but is getting mixed reviews on Capitol Hill. Kailey Leinz breaks down what lawmakers told Balance of Power about the deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Fed Enters Its Kevin Warsh Era
title_cn: 美联储进入凯文·沃什时代
summary:
On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Enda Curran joins host David Gura to talk about Kevin Warsh’s first Federal Reserve meeting as chairman and his missing forecast on the dot plot. Listen wherever you get your podcasts. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Obama Opens Center With Celebrities, Rebuke of Trumpian Politics
title_cn: 奥巴马与名人开设中心，谴责特朗普政治
summary: Former president calls for civility, inclusivity as he unveils $850 million campus

title: Trump Antagonist Picked by DC Democrats in Mayoral Primary Race
title_cn: 特朗普的对手在市长初选中被华盛顿特区民主党人选中
summary: Democratic voters in Washington, DC, picked Councilwoman Janeese Lewis George as their top choice in the city’s mayoral primary, putting the self-described democratic socialist on course to become President Donald Trump’s latest antagonist in the nation’s capital.

title: US-Iran Deal Takes Effect | Balance of Power 6/18/2026
title_cn: 美伊协议生效 |权力平衡 6/18/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the memorandum of understanding between the US and Iran. On today's show, Center for Strategic and International Studies Director Mona Yacoubian, Bluestack Strategies Founder Maura Gillespie, Bellwether Government Affairs CEO Arshi Siddiqui, former Fed Vice Chair Lael Brainard and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chairman Laura Swett. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hegseth Flags Review of US Forces With Europe Fearing Troop Cuts
title_cn: 赫格斯提出对美军进行审查，欧洲担心削减军队
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US will conduct a six-month review of its military presence in Europe in a confrontational speech at NATO headquarters in Brussels where he blasted some allies for a “shameful” lack of support during the recent war against Iran.

title: Lithuania's Nauseda Says Putin Can't Win the War With Ukraine
title_cn: 立陶宛总统纳乌塞达称普京无法赢得与乌克兰的战争
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda discusses the changing battlefield in Ukraine, Europe's response to the war, and President Donald Trump's push for peace. He also weighs in on Israel's role in the war with Iran, its impact on energy prices and inflation, and whether China poses a growing economic threat. He spoke with Bloomberg's Oliver Crook in Brussels. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vance Warns Israeli Cabinet Against Attacking Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列内阁不要攻击特朗普的伊朗协议
summary: US Vice President JD Vance hit back at Israeli cabinet members who have criticized Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran.

title: Burnham Advised By Ex-BOE, Goldman Economists Ahead of UK PM Bid
title_cn: 伯纳姆在英国首相竞选前接受前英国央行和高盛经济学家的咨询
summary: Would-be UK prime minister Andy Burnham has expanded his team of economic advisers ahead of an expected tilt at the leadership this summer, in a bid to add credibility to his nascent policy platform.

title: US Student Loan Defaults Rise to 9.2 Million Amid Crackdown
title_cn: 美国学生贷款违约率在打击行动中上升至 920 万
summary: The number of student loan borrowers in default soared to a record 9.16 million in April after the government ended a four-year pause on collections that was instituted during the Covid pandemic, according to the latest data from the US Department of Education.

title: Vance Warns Israel Against Attacking Its ‘Only Powerful Ally’
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列不要攻击其“唯一强大的盟友”
summary: President Trump “is the only head of state in the entire world who is sympathetic to the nation of Israel at this moment in time,” Vice President JD Vance said, in response to Israeli officials’ criticism of the US-Iran deal. He spoke during a press briefing at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Makes Market-Friendly Changes in Face of Trump Pressure
title_cn: 面对特朗普压力，古巴做出有利于市场的改变
summary: Cuba’s leadership signed off on a sweeping list of 176 market-liberalization measures covering 23 core areas, as the Caribbean nation tries to rescue a moribund economy that’s being squeezed by US sanctions.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Kicks In as Focus Shifts to Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 随着焦点转向霍尔木兹流，特朗普的伊朗协议开始生效
summary:
US President Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran is starting to take effect, with focus shifting to the resumption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.
Wayne Sanders, Senior Defense Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the memorandum and what he expects to see over the next two months as talks resume for a nuclear deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lithuania’s Nauseda Says It’s Not the Time to Talk With Putin
title_cn: 立陶宛总统纳乌塞达表示现在不是与普京交谈的时候
summary: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda said the European Union shouldn’t rush into peace talks with Russia, distancing himself from recent EU efforts to engage Vladimir Putin.
